query: SELECT e.id, e.name, e.menuSlug, e.isOpen, e.manuallyClosed, b.dayOfWeek, b.isActive, b.openTime, b.closeTime FROM establishments e LEFT JOIN businessHours b ON e.id = b.establishmentId WHERE e.id = 60018 ORDER BY b.dayOfWeek;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT e.id, e.name, e.menuSlug, e.isOpen, e.manuallyClosed, b.dayOfWeek, b.isActive, b.openTime, b.closeTime FROM establishments e LEFT JOIN businessHours b ON e.id = b.establishmentId WHERE e.id = 60018 ORDER BY b.dayOfWeek;
